  • Uses of ElfFile in net.boricj.bft.elf

    Methods in net.boricj.bft.elf that return ElfFile
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ElfFile
    ElfFile.Builder.build()
    Builds an ELF file from this builder configuration.
    ElfFile
    ElfSection.getElfFile()
    Returns the ELF file this section belongs to.
    ElfFile
    ElfFile.Parser.parse()
    Parses and returns an ELF file from the configured input stream.

    Constructor
    Description
    protected

    Constructs an ELF header from a builder configuration.
    protected
    ElfHeader(ElfFile elf, ElfFile.Parser parser)

    Creates an empty section table.

    Creates a new MIPS register info section with full parameters.

    Parses a MIPS register info section from an input stream.

    Description

    Creates a NOBITS section with full parameters.

    Parses a NOBITS section from an input stream.

    Creates a null section with default parameters.

    Creates a null section with specified parameters.

    Parses a null section from an input stream.
     
    ElfProgBits(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addralign, byte[] bytes)
    Creates a PROGBITS section with the specified properties.
     
    ElfProgBits(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addralign, long entsize, byte[] bytes)
    Creates a PROGBITS section with the specified properties and entry size.
     
    ElfProgBits(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addr, long offset, long addralign, long entsize, byte[] bytes)
    Creates a PROGBITS section with complete properties for file layout.
     
    ElfProgBits(ElfFile elf, ElfFile.Parser parser, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addr, long offset, long size, int link, int info, long addralign, long entsize)
    Parses a PROGBITS section from an ELF file.
     
    ElfRelaTable(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addr, long offset, long addralign, long entsize, ElfSymbolTable symbolTable, ElfSection section)
    Creates a RELA relocation table with complete properties.
     
    ElfRelaTable(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfSymbolTable symbolTable, ElfSection section)
    Creates a RELA relocation table for the specified section.
     
    ElfRelaTable(ElfFile elf, ElfFile.Parser parser, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addr, long offset, long size, int link, int info, long addralign, long entsize)
    Parses a RELA relocation table from an ELF file.
     
    ElfRelTable(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addr, long offset, long addralign, long entsize, ElfSymbolTable symbolTable, ElfSection section)
    Creates a new relocation table with specified settings.
     
    ElfRelTable(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfSymbolTable symbolTable, ElfSection section)
    Creates a new relocation table with default settings.
     
    ElfRelTable(ElfFile elf, ElfFile.Parser parser, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addr, long offset, long size, int link, int info, long addralign, long entsize)
    Reads a relocation table from an ELF file.
     
    ElfStringTable(ElfFile elf, String name)
    Creates a new string table with default settings.
     
    ElfStringTable(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addralign, long entsize)
    Creates a new string table with specified flags and alignment.

    Creates a new string table with full settings.
     
    ElfStringTable(ElfFile elf, ElfFile.Parser parser, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addr, long offset, long size, int link, int info, long addralign, long entsize)
    Reads a string table from an ELF file.
     
    ElfSymbolTable(ElfFile elf, String name, ElfSectionFlags flags, long addr, long offset, long addralign, long entsize, ElfStringTable stringTable)
    Creates a new symbol table with specified settings.

    Creates a new symbol table with default settings.
